_comment: PUBLIC throwaway TestNet demo wallet — the SAME agent wallet the Claude x402-demo skill / MCP server pays from (PAYER_MNEMONIC in committed .env.demo). TestNet ALGO is valueless and this key is published on purpose so the browser can auto-sign as this agent without Pera pairing. NEVER reuse on MainNet. Source of truth: .env.demo.
